stemHtml: The Basic Regulation refers to a…

options.a: Non-Binding rule adopted by the European Commission, establishing aeronautical rules and basic standards.
options.b: Binding rule adopted by the European Parliament and the Council, establishing the EASA.
options.c: Non-Binding rule adopted by EASA, establishing implementing Acts and Delegated Acts.
options.d: Binding rule adopted by the EASA, establishing Acceptable Means of Compliance.
